description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a geometric, quilted pattern on its armrests and base, and a striking black-and-white polka dot pattern on its seat and back cushions. The sofa features two large, square seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be loose and uniform in size. The armrests are broad, straight, and extend to the same height as the backrest, providing a boxy, contemporary silhouette. The legs are short and blocky, mostly recessed beneath the sofa, giving it a low-profile appearance. The upholstery on the arms and base is a light gray with a diamond-quilted texture, contrasting with the bold, glossy patterned cushions. This piece is visually striking and would stand out in an urban park, sidewalk lounge, or modern public waiting area.
description: A modern sofa with quilted light gray arms and base, and bold black-and-white polka dot cushions. It features a boxy silhouette, broad armrests, and two large seat and back cushions.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sofa's two large polka dot cushions for both seat and back, with wide quilted armrests on either side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sofa's deep seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the straight, boxy armrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous quilted back and the subtle seam between the two back cushions, with no visible legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the depth of the seat and the uniformity of the armrest and cushion design.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all uniform in size and placed side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy profile and quilted upholstery.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs recessed beneath the sofa, mostly hidden from view, likely made of wood or metal.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two large, loose cushions, continuous and unsegmented except for the cushion seam.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Armrests and base feature a light gray diamond-quilted pattern, while seat and back cushions have a bold black-and-white polka dot pattern.
